title: ComparisonReport
description: The Closer's final output: every gathered quote (pre- and post-negotiation), ranked, with transcript evidence and a recommended deal in plain language.

job_spec_version_hash.description: Must match the spec_version_hash of the confirmed job spec used on every call - proves all quotes are for the same job.

call_outcome_type.description: The Caller's original outcome type for this company.

original_total.description: Total from The Caller's call, before negotiation.

negotiated_total.description: Total after The Closer's callback, if a negotiation call occurred.

total_estimate.description: The final number used for ranking - negotiated_total if present, else original_total.

condition.description: e.g. 'only if truck can't park within 75ft' - required for conditional fees.

resolution.description: What the Closer found when it probed a flagged quote - e.g. confirmed missing fees, or reassured after questioning.

transcript_refs.description: Paths or IDs pointing to the call transcript(s) this quote's data came from - the original Caller call and, if applicable, the Closer callback.

rank.description: 1 = best deal. Ties broken by binding status, then by red_flag.flagged (unflagged ranks above flagged at the same price).

recommended_quote_id.description: quote_id of the recommended deal - not necessarily the lowest total_estimate if it's flagged or non-binding.

recommendation_explanation.description: Plain-language explanation of why this quote is recommended, citing specific transcript evidence (e.g. 'lowest binding total after negotiation; QuickHaul's lower number was flagged as missing fuel and stairs fees, confirmed in callback transcript').
